tagline: Legacy dashboard color palette setting removed: The workspace setting for the legacy dashboard color palette has been removed, as legacy dashboards are no longer supported.
what_it_does: Legacy dashboard color palette setting removed: The workspace setting for the legacy dashboard color palette has been removed, as legacy dashboards are no longer supported. AI/BI workspace level color palettes remain available and unchanged. Genie Space descriptions on dashboards: Authors can now add descriptions to Genie Spaces embedded in dashboards.
why_it_matters: Custom calculations are one of the following types: Calculated measures: Aggregated values such as total sales or average cost.
plain_summary: Legacy dashboard color palette setting removed: The workspace setting for the legacy dashboard color palette has been removed, as legacy dashboards are no longer supported. AI/BI workspace level color palettes remain available and unchanged.

capabilities.title: The optional INCLUSIVE keyword includes
capabilities.desc: The optional INCLUSIVE keyword includes the current row in the range. EXCLUSIVE excludes it. Defaults to EXCLUSIVE.

capabilities.title: Example: TRAILING 7 DAY INCLUSIVE
capabilities.desc: Example: TRAILING 7 DAY INCLUSIVE or LEADING 1 MONTH

key_takeaway: Legacy dashboard color palette setting removed: The workspace setting for the legacy dashboard color palette has been removed, as legacy dashboards are no longer supported.
